query_text: Can I deduct home-office expenses as a sole proprietor?
doc_text: A sole proprietor can deduct home-office expenses on Schedule C if the space is used regularly and exclusively for business.

query_text: Can I deduct home-office expenses as a sole proprietor?
doc_text: A corporation deducts office lease payments as a business expense; the lease must be in the company name and at arm's length.

query_text: Can I deduct home-office expenses as a sole proprietor?
doc_text: The standard deduction reduces taxable income for individuals who do not itemize personal deductions.

query_text: Can I deduct home-office expenses as a sole proprietor?
doc_text: The simplified method lets you deduct a flat rate per square foot of home office space instead of tracking actual expenses.

query_text: Is a Roth IRA better than a traditional IRA for a young investor?
doc_text: A Roth IRA grows tax-free and suits young investors in lower tax brackets; a traditional IRA defers tax until withdrawal.

query_text: Is a Roth IRA better than a traditional IRA for a young investor?
doc_text: Employer 401k matching is effectively free money and should usually be captured before funding an IRA.

query_text: Is a Roth IRA better than a traditional IRA for a young investor?
doc_text: Roth conversions in retirement can manage required minimum distributions but trigger tax in the conversion year.
